title: Slide 12: 2D SPHERES
prompt: Presentation slide 12: "2D SPHERES". A single hero KPI value of 90%. Lift to a 3D scene where the number itself is the monumental subject — extruded text on a pedestal, dramatic single-light cinematic feel, title hovering above. Keynote / TED-stage aesthetic.

source.prompt: Presentation slide 12: "2D SPHERES". A single hero KPI value of 90%. Lift to a 3D scene where the number itself is the monumental subject — extruded text on a pedestal, dramatic single-light cinematic feel, title hovering above. Keynote / TED-stage aesthetic.
source.from2dCode: 2D code shows: text2dSDF('90%', height=0.7) as hero value, text2dSDF('2D SPHERES', height=0.12) as title above, rounded_rectangle pedestal below, text2dSDF('Description 1', height=0.07) as caption. Palette: clean presentation (blue accent, soft ink, gradient BG).
